title: Aureline AI spend receipt, branch-agent spend rollup, and spend-receipt audit-event vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the spend_receipt_record, branch_agent_spend_rollup_record, and spend_receipt_audit_event_record frozen in docs/ai/spend_and_route_receipt_contract.md. Every dispatched, cancelled, or blocked AI invocation pairs its provider_route_receipt_record with one spend_receipt_record so the seven minimum spend-attribution dimensions, the coarse cost-envelope band, and the user-charge band are inspectable on one cross-tool readout. The branch_agent_spend_rollup_record aggregates per-hop spend receipts under one chain id so a chained agent run reports cumulative spend on a single review row. Raw cost amounts in any specific currency, raw token counts, raw provider unit prices, raw billing-account ids, and raw user identifiers never cross this boundary; records carry opaque refs, structured fields, and coarse buckets only. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/provider_route_receipt.schema.json (route receipt the spend receipt pairs with), schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json (cost envelope, spend-attribution dimensions, budget scope, exhaustion state, fallback posture, route-selection-disclosure ref, agent ceiling), schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json (quota family, retention stance, region posture, execution locus, cost visibility), and schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json (assembly id, redaction class). The eventual metering crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new was_charged_to_user_class, budget_scope_outcome_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason is additive-minor and requires a spend_receipt_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

spend_receipt_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this AI spend-receipt vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets. Raw cost amounts, raw token counts, raw provider unit prices, raw billing-account ids, raw user identifiers, raw URLs, raw provider payloads, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, and raw mTLS material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in receipt readouts, support exports, admin reconciliation, and replay surfaces. Never quotes raw cost amounts, raw token counts, raw user identifiers, or raw billing-account ids.

run_state_class.description: Run-state class re-exported from schemas/ai/provider_route_receipt.schema.json without modification. The spend receipt's run_state_class MUST mirror the paired route receipt's run_state_class verbatim.

cost_envelope_class.description: Cost-envelope class re-exported from schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json without modification. Reviewers see the bucket verbatim; the raw cost number in any specific currency never crosses this boundary.

cost_visibility_class.description: Cost-visibility class re-exported from schemas/ai/context_assembly.schema.json without modification.

quota_family_class.description: Quota-family class re-exported from schemas/ai/provider_registry.schema.json without modification.

spend_attribution_dimension_class.description: Spend-attribution-dimension class re-exported from schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json without modification. A spend receipt MUST emit at minimum the seven dimensions named in the budget contract; missing any denies with spend_attribution_minimum_set_missing.

value_ref.description: Opaque ref or coarse class label for the dimension value. Raw user identifiers, raw billing-account ids, and raw cost amounts never appear here.

spend_attribution_value_row.description: One typed (dimension, value) row the spend receipt emits. The receipt's spend_attribution_values MUST cover at least the seven minimum dimensions; missing any denies with spend_attribution_minimum_set_missing.

budget_scope_class.description: Budget-scope class re-exported from schemas/ai/graduation_packet.schema.json without modification.

budget_scope_outcome_class.description: Budget-scope-outcome vocabulary naming whether the run landed under, at, or over the band of each budget scope. scope_over_band_blocked is the canonical state for a budget-blocked refusal; scope_outcome_unknown_pre_dispatch is admitted only on preview_pre_dispatch receipts.

budget_scope_outcome_row.description: One per-scope outcome row. A receipt MUST carry at least three rows covering per_request, per_session, and per_agent_invocation; missing any denies with budget_scope_outcome_required_minimum_missing.

was_charged_to_user_class.description: Charge-locus vocabulary answering 'did this run cost the user anything, and through which path'. A receipt whose run_state_class is budget_blocked_refusal, route_blocked_refusal, cancelled_by_user, or cancelled_by_policy MUST carry not_charged_run_blocked; disagreement denies with charge_locus_disagrees_with_run_state.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

deployment_profile_class.description: Deployment-profile class re-exported from schemas/identity/policy_bundle.schema.json without modification.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Empty string when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the receipt was minted under. A policy-epoch roll between preview and post-run forces re-resolution; a receipt re-used across an epoch roll denies with policy_epoch_rolled_invalidations.

redaction_class.description: Redaction class re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). Raw cost amounts in any specific currency, raw token counts, raw provider unit prices, raw user identifiers, and raw billing-account ids never cross this boundary regardless of class.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the ai_spend_receipt audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw cost amounts, raw token counts, raw user identifiers, raw billing-account ids, or raw provider payloads.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a best-effort spend receipt is forbidden.

display_label.description: Short human-readable label support / review surfaces render verbatim. Never the raw cost amount or raw billing-account id.

route_receipt_ref.description: Opaque ref to the paired provider_route_receipt_record. The spend receipt's run_state_class MUST mirror the route receipt's run_state_class verbatim.

spend_attribution_dimensions.description: Spend-attribution dimensions the receipt emits. MUST include at minimum workflow_or_surface_id_dimension, provider_entry_id_dimension, model_entry_id_dimension, execution_locus_class_dimension, region_posture_class_dimension, retention_stance_class_dimension, and quota_family_class_dimension; missing any denies with spend_attribution_minimum_set_missing.

spend_attribution_values.description: Per-dimension typed (class, value_ref) rows. The receipt MUST carry one row per dimension declared in spend_attribution_dimensions.

budget_scope_outcomes.description: Per-budget-scope outcome rows. MUST cover at minimum per_request, per_session, and per_agent_invocation; missing any denies with budget_scope_outcome_required_minimum_missing.

originating_graduation_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the graduation packet the run was admitted under. Empty for shadow / experimental / disabled runs.

originating_route_selection_disclosure_r.description: Opaque ref to the route_selection_disclosure_record. Required (non-empty) when the paired route receipt's route_selection_reason_class is anything other than cheapest_qualifying_route_admitted / no_cheaper_qualifying_route_existed; empty otherwise.

originating_approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the admitting approval ticket. Required (non-empty) when route_selection_override_reason_class is policy_pinned_more_expensive_route or user_explicit_choice_overrides_cheapest and the workflow's approval posture is above allowed_without_prompt; empty otherwise.

branch_agent_chain_id.description: Opaque id of the branch-agent chain this receipt belongs to. Empty string when the run is not part of a chain.

branch_agent_hop_index.description: Zero-based hop index inside the branch-agent chain. Null when branch_agent_chain_id is empty.

opaque_provider_cost_unit_ref.description: Opaque ref to a typed cost-unit record minted by the eventual metering crate. Empty string when no metering ref exists; the receipt still carries the cost-envelope class verbatim. Never a raw cost amount.

notes_summary.description: Short reviewer-visible sentence. Never quotes raw cost amounts, raw token counts, raw user identifiers, or raw billing-account ids.

last_updated_at.description: Monotonic timestamp the receipt was last updated. On the first mint last_updated_at equals minted_at.

allOf.description: Cancelled / blocked run states MUST carry was_charged_to_user_class = not_charged_run_blocked.
preview_pre_dispatch MUST NOT carry a charged_* charge locus; only not_charged_local, not_charged_bundled, charge_unknown_unverified, or not_charged_run_blocked are admitted on a preview receipt.

spend_receipt_record.description: One governed spend receipt per AI invocation. Surface authors mint exactly one spend_receipt_record per dispatched / cancelled / blocked run; the receipt is the cross-tool boundary every metering, support, and review surface reads.

per_hop_spend_receipt_refs.description: Opaque refs to every per-hop spend_receipt_record under this chain. Length is the chain depth; bounded ceilings cap the maximum length per the budget contract's agent_ceiling_class.

originating_graduation_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the graduation packet the chain was admitted under. Empty for shadow / experimental chains.

originating_approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the admitting approval ticket. Required (non-empty) when the paired route rollup's agent_ceiling_class = agent_invocation_unbounded_admin_only; empty otherwise.

branch_agent_spend_rollup_record.description: Cumulative-spend rollup for branch-agent chains. The rollup aggregates per-hop spend receipts under one chain id so review surfaces see the agent's total cost band on one row instead of N uncorrelated rows.

spend_receipt_ref.description: Opaque ref to the spend_receipt_record the event refers to. Empty string only on branch_agent_spend_rollup_emitted (where rollup_ref carries the readout) and spend_receipt_schema_version_bumped.

rollup_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_agent_spend_rollup_record the event refers to. Empty string when the event is not rollup-scoped.

denial_reason.description: Optional denial_reason string from the denial_reason enum. Empty string for non-deny events.

spend_receipt_audit_event_record.description: Observable event on the ai_spend_receipt audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw cost amounts, raw token counts, raw user identifiers, raw billing-account ids, or raw provider payloads.
